title: Sign in and reach the admin dashboard
description: An internal user can authenticate with valid credentials and land on the admin dashboard with access to management areas.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify access to admin management sections is available

title: Submit a contact inquiry successfully
description: A visitor can fill out the contact form and submit an inquiry that results in a confirmation of receipt.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the contact name field with a valid name
Fill in the contact email field with a valid email address
Fill in the inquiry subject field with a valid subject
Fill in the inquiry message field with a valid message
Submit the contact form
Verify a confirmation that the request was sent is visible

title: Explore the home page and continue browsing
description: A visitor can read the home page intro, review featured content, and continue to another public section of the site.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the featured services section
Scroll to the testimonials section
Click the call to action to continue browsing
Verify a public destination page is displayed
Verify featured content from the home page is visible

title: Open a service detail page from the services directory
description: A visitor can browse services and open an individual service page to review its detailed information.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click a service entry to open its detail page
Verify the service detail content is displayed
Verify service metadata such as tags, tech stack, process steps, or stats is displayed

title: Open the admin sign-in page
description: An internal user can reach the admin login page from the public site.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Verify the admin login form is displayed

title: Browse all services from the directory
description: A visitor can open the services directory and review the available service cards for comparison.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Verify service cards are displayed
Verify multiple service offerings are visible

title: View the home page introduction and agency highlights
description: A visitor can land on the home page and see the main introduction and agency highlight content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the main agency introduction is displayed
Verify highlighted content sections are visible

title: Browse open jobs and start an application
description: A job candidate can review available roles in Careers and begin applying for one from the listing view.

steps.description: Navigate to /careers
Scroll to the open roles section
Click a job listing to open its details
Verify the job detail view is displayed
Click the apply action for the role
Verify the application form is displayed

title: Open a highlighted service from the home page
description: A visitor can start on the home page and open a service detail page from featured service content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a highlighted service link
Verify a service detail page is displayed
Verify service details are visible

title: Submit a contact inquiry with minimal valid details
description: A visitor can provide the required contact information and send an inquiry successfully from the contact page.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the contact name field with a valid name
Fill in the contact email field with a valid email address
Fill in the inquiry message field with a valid message
Submit the contact form
Verify a confirmation that the request was sent is visible

title: Submit a job application successfully
description: A job candidate can complete and submit an application with valid details and see confirmation that it was received.

steps.description: Navigate to /careers
Click a job listing to open its details
Click the apply action for the role
Fill in the applicant name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Fill in the cover letter field with an application message
Submit the application form
Verify a successful application confirmation is visible

title: Review a job role before applying
description: A job candidate can open a specific job from Careers and see its requirements and role details before starting an application.

steps.description: Navigate to /careers
Click a job listing to open its details
Verify the role details are displayed
Verify the job requirements are displayed

title: Add a job listing
description: An admin can create a new job listing and see it appear in the jobs list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/jobs
Click the control to add a new job listing
Fill in the job title field with Junior Frontend Developer
Fill in the job summary field with Build and maintain client-facing web experiences.
Save the job listing
Verify the new job listing appears in the jobs list
Verify the listing is available for career-page publishing

title: Create a service successfully
description: An admin can add a new service from the services manager and see it appear in the list after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/services
Add a new service using valid details
Save the service
Verify the new service appears in the services list

title: Start a job application from a role detail page
description: A job candidate can open a role detail page and reach the application form from that context.

steps.description: Navigate to /careers
Click a job listing to open its details
Click the apply action for the role
Verify the application form is displayed

title: Review the service description on a detail page
description: A visitor can open a service detail page and see the service’s explanatory content.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click a service entry to open its detail page
Verify the service description is displayed
Verify the service detail page remains accessible

title: Learn about the company from the home page
description: A visitor can move from the home page to the company background page using the site navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to learn more about the company
Verify the company overview page is displayed
Verify company background content is visible

title: Add a testimonial
description: An admin can add a new testimonial and see it appear in the testimonial list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/testimonials
Click the control to add a new testimonial
Fill in the testimonial content field with Great support and clear communication throughout the project.
Fill in the author name field with Jordan Lee
Save the testimonial
Verify the new testimonial appears in the list
Verify the testimonial is available for future management actions

title: Update contact details successfully
description: An admin can update the site contact details and see the saved values reflected in the editor.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to manage contact information
Fill in the address field with a new valid address
Fill in the phone number field with a new valid phone number
Fill in the email field with a new valid email address
Save the contact information changes
Verify the updated contact information is reflected in the editor
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Edit a service successfully
description: An admin can update an existing service and see the updated version reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/services
Select an existing service for editing
Update the service details with valid changes
Save the changes
Verify the updated service appears in the services list

title: Open the training program page
description: A prospective trainee can navigate to the training page and review the program overview and offerings.

steps.description: Navigate to /training
Verify the training program overview is displayed
Verify the training offering details are displayed

title: Review submitted applications
description: An admin can open the applications page and inspect the details of a submitted application.

Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

title: Delete a service successfully
description: An admin can delete an existing service after confirming the action and see it removed from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

title: Compare services and continue to company context
description: A visitor can browse services, open a detailed service page, and then navigate to an informational page for more context.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click a service card

title: Reorder services and keep the new order

Fill in the admin email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/services
Drag a service row to a new position
Drop the service in the new position
Verify the services list reflects the new order

title: Edit a job listing
description: An admin can update an existing job listing and see the changes reflected in the jobs list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/jobs
Open an existing job listing for editing

title: Required contact fields cannot be left blank

Submit the login form
Click the link to manage contact information
Clear the address field
Clear the phone number field
Save the contact information changes

Verify service detail content is not shown

Save the contact information changes
